SHOOT.title: Shoot
SHOOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If loaded, deal {Damage:diff()} damage (+3) and gain 1 Imprint. If empty, draw 1 card.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If loaded, deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain 1 Imprint. If empty, draw 1 card.}
DEFEND_GUNSLINGER.title: Defend
PANNING.title: Panning
PANNING.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Fire all loaded bullets in order. Each shot deals {Damage:diff()} damage. Retain.|Fire all loaded bullets in order. Each shot deals {Damage:diff()} damage.}
SPRAY_FIRE.title: Spray Fire
SPRAY_FIRE.description: Fire all loaded bullets at random enemies. Deal {Damage:diff()} total damage. Gain [gold]Imprint[/gold] by shots fired (max 3).
SEAL_LOAD.title: Seal Load
SEAL_LOAD.description: Load 1 Seal round (max 1). If a Seal round is already loaded, gain +1 Seal Level instead. {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 8 Block.|Gain 5 Block.}
SEAL_SEARCH.title: Seal Search
SEAL_SEARCH.description: Draw {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} cards. Move the highest-level Seal bullet into the firing chamber.
SEAL_RITE.title: Seal Rite
SEAL_RITE.description: Power: At turn start, if a Seal round is loaded, increase Seal Level by 1. On play, if no Seal round is loaded, load 1 Seal round. {IfUpgraded:show:Innate.|}
SEAL_OPEN.title: Seal Open
SEAL_OPEN.description: Move the highest-level Seal bullet into the firing chamber. {IfUpgraded:show:Increase its level by 2.|}
SEAL_AMPLIFY.title: Seal Amplify
SEAL_AMPLIFY.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Increase the level of all loaded Seal bullets by 4.|Choose a Seal bullet and increase its level by 3.}
SEAL_RESONANCE.title: Seal Resonance
SEAL_RESONANCE.description: Deal damage equal to twice the highest Seal bullet level.
SEAL_IMPRINT.title: Seal Imprint
SEAL_IMPRINT.description: Permanently set a Seal bullet's level to at least 5.
SEAL_RELEASE_KAI.title: Seal Release: Kai
SEAL_RELEASE_KAI.description: Fire a loaded Seal bullet twice. {IfUpgraded:show:Retain.|}
SEAL_RAMPAGE.title: Seal Rampage
SEAL_RAMPAGE.description: Playable only if a Seal bullet is loaded. Halve all Seal Levels. Gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
SEAL_INSIGHT.title: Seal Insight
SEAL_INSIGHT.description: Draw {Draw} cards. If a Seal bullet is loaded, draw +1. If Seal Level is 7+, draw +1 more.
IMPRINT.title: Imprint
IMPRINT_MANIFEST_RICOCHET.title: Manifest Ricochet
IMPRINT_MANIFEST_RICOCHET.description: Spend {IfUpgraded:show:3|4} Imprint. This turn, all bullet fires trigger Ricochet.
SILVER_BULLET.title: Silver Bullet
UNLOAD.title: Unload
SABOTAGE.title: Sabotage
SABOTAGE.description: All enemies lose 5 Strength until end of turn.
STEADY_AIM.title: Steady Aim
EMPTY_THE_MAGAZINE.title: Empty the Magazine
EMPTY_THE_MAGAZINE.description: Remove all bullets. Draw that many cards. You cannot draw cards for the rest of this turn.
TRACER_LOAD.title: Tracer Load
TRACER_CONVERSION.title: Tracer Conversion
TRACER_CONVERSION.description: Convert up to 2 loaded Normal bullets into Tracer bullets. {IfUpgraded:show:Draw 1 card.|}
READ_THE_MARK.title: Read the Mark
READ_THE_MARK.description: Gain Block. If you have Ricochet stack, draw 1 and rotate cylinder 1.
FAN_THE_BRAND.title: Fan the Brand
TAG_BURST.title: Tag Burst
TAG_BURST.description: Fire 1 time. If it fires, deal burst damage and gain Ricochet.
WALKING_FIRE.title: Walking Fire
WALKING_FIRE.description: Spend 3 Imprint. {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 3 times.|Trigger Pull 2 times.} If any shot succeeds, load 1 Tracer round.
CROSSFIRE_RHYTHM.title: Crossfire Rhythm
CROSSFIRE_RHYTHM.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Imprint 2 consumed. Fire 2 times. If Tracer Rhythm is active, +1 fire.|Imprint 2 consumed. Fire 1 time. If Tracer Rhythm is active, +1 fire.}
TAKE_COVER.title: Take Cover
TAKE_COVER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain +1 Block per empty chamber.|Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain +1 Block per empty chamber. Become [Reload Locked] this turn.}
RICOCHET_SHOT.title: Ricochet Shot
RICOCHET_SHOT.description: Spend 3 Imprint. Gain 2 Ricochet. Your next Attack costs 0. {IfUpgraded:show:(Costs 2).|(Costs 3).}
EXECUTION_SHOT.title: Execution Shot
EXECUTION_SHOT.description: Trigger Pull 1 time. If target is at or below half HP, deal {IfUpgraded:show:3x|2x} damage. Gain 3 Imprint.
QUICK_RACK.title: Quick Rack
QUICK_RACK.description: Spend 1 Imprint. Load 2 Tracer rounds. {IfUpgraded:show:If Tracer Rhythm is ON, Trigger Pull 2 times. Otherwise, draw 1 card.|If Tracer Rhythm is ON, Trigger Pull 1 time. Otherwise, draw 1 card.}
HOT_CHAMBER.title: Hot Chamber
HOT_CHAMBER.description: Load 2 Tracer rounds. {IfUpgraded:show:If Tracer Rhythm is ON, draw 2 cards. Otherwise, draw 1 card.|If Tracer Rhythm is ON, draw 2 cards. Otherwise, draw 1 card. Base: Spend 1 Imprint.}
CHAIN_BURST.title: Chain Burst
CHAIN_BURST.description: Spend 2 Imprint. Trigger Pull 1 time. If Tracer Rhythm is ON, {IfUpgraded:show:+2 times.|+1 time.}
OVERCLOCK_DRUM.title: Overclock Drum
OVERCLOCK_DRUM.description: The first Tracer shot you fire each turn triggers 1 extra trigger pull.
SIGIL_GUARD.title: Sigil Guard
SIGIL_GUARD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 12 Block. Gain +1 Block per Seal Level.|Gain 8 Block. Gain +1 Block per Seal Level.}
GRAND_RITE.title: Grand Rite
GRAND_RITE.description: Increase all loaded Seal levels by {IfUpgraded:show:3|2}, then fire the current chamber once.
ECHO_NOTE.title: Echo Note
ECHO_NOTE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 1 Imprint. Draw 2 cards.|Spend 1 Imprint. Draw 1 card.}
REBOUND_NET.title: Rebound Net
ETCHED_TRACER.title: Etched Tracer
ETCHED_TRACER.description: Fire 1 shot. Load 1 Tracer round. {IfUpgraded:show:Instead, load 2 Tracer rounds.|}
CHAMBER_SWAP_NEXT.title: Chamber Swap Next
CHAMBER_SWAP_NEXT.description: Swap the current firing chamber with the next chamber.
EVASION.title: Evasion
EVASION.description: The next damage you take this turn is halved. {IfUpgraded:show:(Costs 0).|}
RELOAD.title: Reload
RELOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 2 Normal bullets (max 6). Draw 1 card.|Load 2 Normal bullets (max 6).}
IMPRINT_IGNITION.title: Imprint Ignition
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION.title: Imprint Compression
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE.title: Overclock Charge
BALLISTIC_COMPILER.title: Ballistic Compiler
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION.description: At the start of your turn, if you have at least {IfUpgraded:show:3|4} Imprint, draw 1 card.
IMPRINT_SQUEEZE.title: Imprint Squeeze
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE.description: On your 3rd successful shot each turn, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold]. {IfUpgraded:show:Innate.|}
BALLISTIC_COMPILER.description: On your first Tracer shot each turn, draw 1 card and gain {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} Imprint.
BLANK_FIRE.title: Blank Fire
BLANK_FIRE.description: Spend {IfUpgraded:show:1|2} Imprint. Set Tracer Rhythm ON. Trigger Pull 1 time.
SEAL_BARRIER.description: Gain 5 Block. If a Seal bullet is loaded, gain additional Block equal to the highest Seal Level × 2.
SEAL_BARRIER.title: Seal Barrier
